_meta.wave_tip_subject: chore(graph): add migration dump and restore guide for new-machine setup

workspace.node_required: >=22.0.0 (engines) / .nvmrc=22 / ci NODE_VERSION=22 / deploy-production.yml uses 'nvm use 20' — PROD DRIFT

ci.ci_jobs_run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; pnpm --filter @transcrib/api run db:generate; pnpm --filter @transcrib/api run db:migrate:deploy; pnpm --filter @transcrib/shared run build; pnpm run lint; pnpm -r run typecheck; pnpm -r run test
ci.deploy_target: SSH to PRODUCTION_HOST as PRODUCTION_USER; cd /opt/transcrib; git reset --hard origin/main; pnpm install + build + migrate + pm2 delete+start ecosystem.config.cjs; final curl /api/health loop 30x5s
ci.deploy_node_runtime_used: nvm use 20 — INCONSISTENT WITH .nvmrc(22) AND engines(>=22)

missing_fields_required_by_strict_mode: project_kind (defaults to standard per schema; absence is P1 GAP because the chain's release-gate has carve-out semantics that key off this field)
runtime_assets[] (P2 — gate would pass trivially; project has ffmpeg/ffprobe/llm-prompts/chromium runtime dependencies that need enumeration)
build.package_manager (derivable from pnpm-lock.yaml but explicit declaration recommended)
build.requires_prisma_generate (Prisma IS used and ci.yml + deploy-production.yml both explicitly run db:generate; should be true)
build.entrypoint (per ecosystem.config.cjs production = api/dist/index.js per changelog aeeae53 fix)
build.test_database_url (ci.yml sets DATABASE_URL inline; not in config.yaml)
deploy.health_endpoint (empty; reality = /api/health curled by deploy job)
config_yaml.port_drift: config.yaml.graph.neo4j_bolt_port=3587, .mcp.json + running container=3627 — pick one and record in both

provider_adapters_in_code.provider: S3 multipart presigned (MinIO dev / Cloud.ru prod)
provider_adapters_in_code.notes: Wire protocol with browser: presigned PUT per 10 MB part + POST /complete with ETags. Confirmed PROJECT-BETA postmortem C6 fix (s3:// scheme rejected by ffprobe) already landed (5d9585d).
Wire protocol with browser: text/event-stream with event:<type> framing (confirmed by 7f983f6 fix).
Local binary; treat as runtime asset, not wire protocol.

non_ts_runtime_assets: worker/src/llm/prompts/ru/* (markdown prompts copied to worker/dist on build per 66049d5)
ffmpeg / ffprobe binaries (used by worker pipeline; not vendored — supplied by server bootstrap TECH-017)
chromium-headless / puppeteer-core (used by UC-302; not vendored — supplied by server bootstrap)

tus_state.code: REMOVED 2026-05-19 per ed6aaa9 — @tus/server, @tus/s3-store, tus-js-client uninstalled; api/src/plugins/tus.ts deleted
tus_state.graph_spec: ADR-005 in graph still says '@tus/server on Fastify; tus-js-client on the frontend; Bridge to MinIO via S3 multipart on chunk completion'
tus_state.tasks_in_status_json: TECH-008 'TUS upload wiring' status: approved (the task records work that has since been undone in code)
tus_state.claudemd_state: CLAUDE.md (currently modified, uncommitted) still says 'Upload: TUS protocol (@tus/server + tus-js-client)'
tus_state.drift_class: P0 release_readiness + artifact_drift (graph stale on an architectural decision)

reverse_proxy.production_state: Caddy server-block on transcriber.itsalt.ru; reverse-proxies to 127.0.0.1:3010 (transcrib-api). Coexists with learn-api + Mattermost.
